summary: The BuildRequest asked to READ and DISPLAY the backend/main.mo file contents to show the hardcoded admin password. However, the diff shows a MODIFIED backend/main.mo file with a comment stating 'REMOVED: getStoredAdminPassword function - passwords should NEVER be exposed via API', indicating that a function to retrieve the password was removed rather than added. No frontend changes are present to display the password to the user. The implementation contradicts the requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Read and display the contents of backend/main.mo file to show the user the hardcoded admin password value
missing_requirements.reason: No implementation found that displays the password to the user. The diff shows a function was REMOVED (getStoredAdminPassword) rather than added. No frontend changes present to display the password value to the user.

hallucinated_features.description: Removal of getStoredAdminPassword function with security rationale
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly requested READING and DISPLAYING the password, with constraints stating 'Only read the file, do not modify any backend code'. However, the diff shows backend code was modified by removing a function, with a comment 'REMOVED: getStoredAdminPassword function - passwords should NEVER be exposed via API'. This modification and security concern were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Authorization check added to checkAdminPassword function
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff shows the checkAdminPassword function now includes authorization logic requiring authenticated users and trapping on unauthorized access. This was not requested in the BuildRequest, which only asked to read and display the password value.
